summary: A single fixed-camera vertical phone video (credited to Margo Martin) of Trump and Xi seated at a long table in a chandelier-lit room in the Great Hall of the People as their bilateral meeting begins, with Trump's opening remarks as the audio track. The frame is static across the clip and shows Trump talking.
notable_text: tweet quote: 'You and I have known each other now for a long time... that's, to me, an honor.'
